steps.title: Identify the multiplier
steps.content:
The model is
$$f(t)=75{,}000(2)^{\frac{t}{380}}$$
The initial population is multiplied by
$$2^{\frac{t}{380}}$$

steps.title: Set one doubling
steps.content:
For the population to double, the multiplier must equal $2$:
$$2^{\frac{t}{380}}=2^1$$
So the exponents are equal:
$$\frac{t}{380}=1$$

steps.title: Solve for t
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $380$: $$t=380$$ The answer is 380.
